pharma.title: Mounjaro takes a hit as generic weight-loss medicines flood the market
pharma.summary: The expiration of Novo Nordisk’s semaglutide patent on March 20, 2026, has triggered a massive shift in India’s ₹1,600 crore GLP-1 market.
pharma.thbAction: Use the article as an entry point to pitch THB's commercial visibility layer for territory planning, account prioritization, and next-best-action for pharma leadership teams.

providers.title: Rs 400 cr RML block waiting for power for over a year
providers.summary: The foundation stone for the project was laid in Aug 2019, and it received formal approval in 2020. Initially expected to be completed within two to three years, the structure was ready by March 2024. By early 2025, nearly all finishing work had been...
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: Empanelled hospitals may exit Ayushman scheme if payment issues remain unresolved: IMA Haryana
providers.summary: In a letter dated April 10, 2026, addressed to the CEO of the Ayushman Bharat Health Protection Authority, Haryana, the association highlighted multiple operational and financial challenges being faced by hospitals under the scheme.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: IHH Healthcare aims to hike its stake in Fortis to 50%: CEO Prem Kumar Nair
providers.summary: Nair said the ambition is to increase its stake in Fortis Healthcare to 50% over the medium term, as the group looks at increasing the beds to 10,000 in India by 2030, but he is clear that growth would not dilute clinical quality.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: PGI revamps procurement after Ayushman Bharat scam
providers.summary: The Ayushman scam involved the transfer of around Rs 88 lakh to pharmaceutical vendors without valid prescriptions. PGI is now transitioning to a secure online indenting system.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: Max Healthcare to acquire Kalinga Hospital controlling stake for ₹300 cr
providers.summary: Under the share purchase agreement, Max will acquire 58.4 per cent stake in the Bhubaneswar-based 250 bed facility, at an equity value of Rs 300 crore (including control premium).
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

diagnostics.title: ICMR backs IIT Kharagpur-developed 'HemoQR' for quick anaemia screening
diagnostics.summary: Called HemoQR, the portable kit, developed by SmartQR Technologies under the mentorship of IIT Kharagpur Director Suman Chakraborty, uses a drop of blood from a finger prick.
diagnostics.thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.

diagnostics.title: Delhi to expand newborn screening to 2.5 lakh infants annually under Mission ANMOL
diagnostics.summary: Health Minister Pankaj Kumar Singh said the scale-up would enable early identification and management of metabolic, endocrine, functional and visible congenital conditions, improving long-term health outcomes.
diagnostics.thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.

diagnostics.title: 9 in 10 Indians Show Silent Health Risks, Says Study
diagnostics.summary: The analysis highlights a widespread burden of silent health risks across the population, with more than 9 in 10 individuals showing early signs of at least one health condition, and a majority exhibiting multiple overlapping risk factors. The preventive...
